description: Search Tip: So you don't have to scroll through pages of addresses on your state page, do this: With Windows, press Control, letter F, with Mac press Command, letter F, then type in your city, zip code, or other search criteria, such as esq. for an attorney. Try zip codes for other nearby towns. Those listings containing an asterisk (*) have sponsored a Wrightslaw conference.

description: Disability Rights Montana former MT Advocacy Program Roberta Zenker, Intake Supervisor 1022 Chestnut Street Helena, MT 59601 (800) 245-4743; (406) 449-2344; (406) 449-2418 (fax) Email: bobbie | at | disabilityrightsmt.org Web: http://www.disabilityrightsmt.org Federally funded non profit law firm representing people with disabilities, including children with disabilities, to protect against abuse and neglect and obtain needed government services, including Special Education.
